description: Lists all value sets defined in a variable library, showing which one is currently active. The 'Default' set is always present; alternate sets contain only overrides.
notes: The 'overrides' field shows how many variables differ from the Default set. Only one value set can be active per workspace. Activate with: fabio variable-library activate-value-set --workspace <WS> --id <ID> --value-set <NAME>. During 'fabio deploy apply --env prod', the value set matching the env name is auto-activated.

query_examples.description: Name of the currently active value set.
Alternative value sets with override counts.
